name: confluence_search
description: Search Confluence pages by keyword or phrase. Returns matching page titles, spaces, excerpts and links.

name: confluence_get_page
description: Fetch the full text content of a Confluence page by its ID. Use after confluence_search to read a specific page.

name: confluence_get_page_children
description: List child pages of a Confluence page by its ID. Useful for navigating page hierarchies.

name: confluence_get_space_page_tree
description: Get the full page tree for a Confluence space. Use to discover documentation structure.

name: jira_search
description: Search Jira issues using JQL (Jira Query Language). Use for finding bugs, tasks, stories, epics, or sprint status.

name: jira_get_issue
description: Get full details of a Jira issue by its key (e.g. PROJ-123), including description, status, assignee, comments.

name: jira_get_project_issues
description: List all issues in a Jira project by project key. Use to see all work items in a project.

name: jira_get_all_projects
description: List all accessible Jira projects with their keys, names and types.

name: jira_get_agile_boards
description: List all Jira agile boards (Scrum or Kanban). Use to find sprint boards.

name: jira_get_sprints_from_board
description: List sprints for a Jira board. Use to find active or past sprint IDs.

name: jira_get_sprint_issues
description: Get all issues in a specific Jira sprint by sprint ID.

name: test_run
description: Execute a pytest test suite (file or directory) and return structured results including pass/fail counts and failure details. Supports modes: once, smoke, stress, regression.

name: test_run_result
description: Retrieve the full result of a previous test run by its run_id. Use after test_run() to fetch stored results.
